title: Langoona
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Langoona |region=*[[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} **''[[Bootana Hutta]]''''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector= |system=[[Langoona system/Legends|Langoona system]] |coordinates=S-10 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*Islands *Warm seas |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Langoonan]]s |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=[[Langoonan deathmask]]s |affiliation= }} {{Quote|A death-mask from Langoona! And you call ''this'' a fitting gift?''"
"''I call it entirely fitting, Jiliac. Today I, Durga Besadii Tai, discovered that you killed Aruk, my parent. I challenge you under the Old Law. Prepare to die.|[[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]] and [[Durga Besadii Tai]]|}} '''Langoona''' was a remote [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the ''[[Bootana Hutta]]'' region of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. ==History== Langoona was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Langoonan]]s. The [[Species/Legends|species]] specialized in the making of [[Langoonan deathmask|deathmasks]]. The Langoonans were [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Hutt Empire]] and gradually became a favored slave species. However, they [[Langoonan rebellion|rebelled]] against the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] but were crushed and large numbers of Langoonans were slaughtered. In retaliation, the Hutts stripped the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of all technology and reduced the surviving Langoonans to a primeval existence. Langoona was also turned into a safari world where the Langoonans were [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] and killed in staged hunts. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Langoona}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Langoona }} [[Category:Bootana Hutta locations]] [[Category:Planets in Hutt Space]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
